opinion.h4: RIDGWAY NATIONAL BANK ET AL. v. PENNSYLVANIA. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF PENNSYLVANIA. No. 516. Decided January 9, 1961.
opinion.p: William I. Crosby and B. R. Coppolo for appellants.
Anne X. Alpern, Attorney General of Pennsylvania, John Sullivan, Deputy Attorney General, and Robert C. Derrick, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
